# Sui Documentation

## General

- [Concepts](https://docs.sui.io/concepts)
- [Guides](https://docs.sui.io/guides)
- [References Overview](https://docs.sui.io/references)

## Concepts

- [Coin Management](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/coin-mgt)

- [gRPC](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/data-access/grpc)

- [Indexer Pipeline Architecture](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/data-access/pipeline-architecture)

- [Sui-Related Research Papers](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/research-papers)

- [Consensus](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/sui-architecture/consensus)
- [Epochs, Equivocation, and Reconfiguration](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/sui-architecture/epochs)
- [Sui Architecture](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/sui-architecture)
- [Networks](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/sui-architecture/networks)
- [Protocol Upgrades](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/sui-architecture/protocol-upgrades)
- [Security](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/sui-architecture/sui-security)
- [Storage](https://docs.sui.io/concepts/sui-architecture/sui-storage)

- [MutateConsensusStreamEnded](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/mutate-consensus-stream-ended)
- [NameRecord](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/name-record)
- [ObjectChangeConnection](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/object-change-connection)
- [ObjectChangeEdge](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/object-change-edge)
- [ObjectChange](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/object-change)
- [ObjectConnection](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/object-connection)
- [ObjectEdge](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/object-edge)
- [ObjectOwner](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/object-owner)
- [Object](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/object)
- [OpenMoveType](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/open-move-type)
- [OtherCommand](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/other-command)
- [OwnedOrImmutable](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/owned-or-immutable)
- [PageInfo](https://docs.sui.io/references/sui-api/sui-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/page-info)

- [Coin Standard](https://docs.sui.io/standards/coin)
- [Currency Standard](https://docs.sui.io/standards/currency)
